title: Push notification endpoint SSRF: no validate_outbound_url
description: push.rs send_push_inner: the server POSTs to the push subscription endpoint URL without calling validate_outbound_url(). Any authenticated user can register a push subscription with an internal/private IP endpoint (e.g. http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/ or http://localhost:8080/admin). When a notification fires, the server sends an HTTP POST to that address. Unlike card fetching which has SSRF protection, push delivery has none. Fix: validate the endpoint URL with validate_outbound_url() at subscription creation time (create_subscription) AND require https scheme.
